3014710.name: Cursed House 6
3014710.description:
Cursed House 6 - a game in the Match 3 Puzzle genre. The increasing difficulty of the game forced us to create two sets of levels: one for regular players and one for hardcore players.
Two new mechanics have been introduced:

Damned Coins - coins that cannot be collected; collecting any coin results in a loss.
Crest
The player can choose the difficulty level in the settings. If the player does not choose anything, the difficulty level is determined automatically based on how the player plays.
This game already includes elements of interactive help, which will be further developed in future games.

The game includes:

4 Hidden Object scenes
8 Spot the Difference scenes
100 Match 3 levels (actually, there are many more levels as some levels come in two variations: easy and hard)
20 Solitaire games
a town to cleanse froom the evil spirits
3014710.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
